description_long: This object is a modern shotgun with a sleek, matte-black finish and a streamlined silhouette. It features a cylindrical barrel with an integrated suppressor or extended muzzle, and a prominent magazine that curves forward beneath the receiver. The stock is compact and ergonomic, with a padded butt and a straight comb, designed for comfortable shoulder support. The receiver is fitted with a simple iron sight and a charging handle on top, while the pistol grip is contoured for a secure hold. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing ample space for finger placement. The overall design suggests a tactical, urban-use firearm with emphasis on maneuverability and control.
description: A modern, matte-black shotgun with a compact stock, curved magazine, and integrated suppressor, designed for tactical urban use. Features include a contoured pistol grip, rounded trigger guard, and streamlined receiver.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the cylindrical barrel, curved magazine, and compact stock.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the narrow profile, alignment of the barrel, and the straight comb of the stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the magazine and stock contours.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view emphasizing the underside of the magazine, trigger guard, and the alignment of the barrel and stock.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, cylindrical with integrated suppressor or extended muzzle, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible reinforcement or finger grooves
